title: Introducing myself
wikitext:
[]: Introducing myself             Quote Post by Mason » Tue Jan 20, 2026 11:50 pm Hello I am I somewhat new fan of Eva and I’d like to introduce myself my name is Mason and I recently watched the original series and EoE and I was hoping to get to know some more Eva fans here’s my current collection I have more still on the way

[]: Re: Introducing myself             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Jan 22, 2026 5:54 pm Oh nice collection Whats the bottom red tinted item. Komm susser Tod?

[]: Re: Introducing myself             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Thu Jan 22, 2026 9:18 pm Amazing collection. I wish I had those two CDs, plus EOE's one. I may go after them eventually... Welcome!

[]: Re: Introducing myself             Quote Post by Mason » Sat Jan 24, 2026 12:19 am kuribo-04 wrote: Oh nice collection Whats the bottom red tinted item. Komm susser Tod?

[]: Re: Introducing myself             Quote Post by Darth Plato » Sun Jan 25, 2026 12:07 am Hi. I am also new here, and recently got more into it due to a second full viewing. Then I watched the rebuilds. This place is a little slow, but I am glad I came here. The fans here are knowledgeable and there is a ton of good reading for fans.

[]: Re: Introducing myself             Quote Post by Diego the Lego » Thu Feb 05, 2026 9:16 pm Awesome collection, the soundtrack cds are so cool.
